best_use_case: Versatile high-intelligence flagship for text+vision tasks, code generation, and general-purpose use. Best all-rounder for production apps.
Budget-friendly high-volume processing, classification, extraction, quick chats, fine-tuning distillation from GPT-4o.
notes: Previous-gen budget option. 128K context, 16.4K max output.

best_use_case: Long-context champion—process entire codebases, legal docs, book-length content. Strong instruction following and tool calling.
Budget long-context processing—summarize large documents, extract data from long inputs, budget-friendly RAG with large context.
notes: 1M token context window. 32.8K max output. Smaller, faster GPT-4.1.

best_use_case: Ultra-low-cost classification, routing, entity extraction, sentiment analysis, data labeling at massive scale.
notes: 1M token context window. 32.8K max output. Cheapest GPT-4.1-class model.

best_use_case: Research-grade deep reasoning, complex math, scientific analysis, multi-step problem solving. Original flagship reasoning model.
notes: Previous full o-series reasoning model. Chain-of-thought reasoning. Expensive—o3 is 7.5x cheaper.

best_use_case: Budget reasoning for math and coding puzzles. Superseded by o3-mini which has higher intelligence at same price.
notes: Deprecated—use o3-mini instead. Text-only, no vision, no function calling, no structured outputs.

best_use_case: Advanced reasoning for math, science, coding, visual reasoning, and technical writing. Think through multi-step problems.
notes: Reasoning model. Succeeded by GPT-5. 200K context, 100K max output.

best_use_case: Budget reasoning—moderate math, code review, logic puzzles where cost matters. Same price as o1-mini but higher intelligence.
notes: Small reasoning model. Text-only. Supports function calling and structured outputs (unlike o1-mini).

best_use_case: Fast, cost-efficient reasoning for coding and visual tasks. Optimized for speed with vision support (unlike o3-mini).
notes: Latest small o-series model. Succeeded by GPT-5 mini. Supports fine-tuning.

best_use_case: Fine-tuned o4-mini for Codex CLI—agentic coding workflows, code generation, code review in CLI environments.
notes: Fine-tuned o4-mini for Codex CLI. For direct API use, OpenAI recommends gpt-4.1.

best_use_case: Legacy high-intelligence model. Superseded by GPT-4o (cheaper, better). Use only for existing integrations.
notes: Legacy model. 128K context but only 4K max output. No structured outputs, no fine-tuning. Very expensive—migrate away.
